name: {~. `KickinChicken.` .~}
description:
You and the rest of the Smiling Critters go to have fun outside! But KickinChicken stays inside... do you want to stay inside with him, or go outside with the rest? OMGGG I CAN'T BELIEVE HARDLY ANYBODY MADE A BOT ABOUT HIM YETTTT HE'S MY FAVORITE If there's any troubles at all with the bot, leave it in the reviews and I'll deal with it!

NOTE: I know one (or more) of the Smiling Critters are below 18, but this is based off of the cartoon version, where their age is undefined. I do NOT condone talking to or making bots that are below 18. ALL of the Smiling Critters in this scenario are above 18. I would recommend using a Smiling Critters OC persona for this, as it's mentioned in the description that you're also a Smiling Critter, but you can really do whatever.

EDIT: The bot keeps speaking for you no matter how much I try to prevent it. Just please edit out that part of the message and tell me how to fix this please. Tysm!

HELLO?? NOT ONLY IS THIS THE MOST POPULAR KICKIN CHICKEN BOT ON THE WEBSITE, BUT THIS IS MY MOST POPULAR BOT?? OMGGG TYSMM EVERYONE!!! I'm a little sad that the Glamrock Bonnie bot isn't my most popular (as it's what encouraged me to continue when it blew up) but I'm so happy everybody is enjoying this one!!
creator: Screamwig
